title: Aadhirai name and household status remain unresolved
claim_or_observation: The Tamil form ஆதிரை is present but preferred transliteration exact age household authority marriage chronology and property status require original-text and social-history review
notes: Binding naming casting publicity and household-design safeguard

title: Sadhuvan leaves Aadhirai
claim_or_observation: The narrative presents Sadhuvan as leaving or neglecting Aadhirai and becoming attached to another woman before undertaking maritime travel
notes: Verify exact chronology agency and relationship vocabulary

title: Aadhirai receives false news of maritime death
claim_or_observation: After Sadhuvan's shipwreck people report that he has died and Aadhirai acts on that report
notes: Verify messengers evidence and exact emotional sequence

title: Aadhirai attempts to enter fire
claim_or_observation: Believing her husband dead Aadhirai prepares or attempts to die in fire but the expected burning does not occur
notes: Requires exact Tamil ritual terminology and safeguarding review

title: A supernatural voice prevents completed self-destruction
claim_or_observation: A voice or divine communication tells Aadhirai that Sadhuvan lives and redirects her from the attempted death
notes: Verify speaker wording and staging mechanics

title: Sadhuvan survives shipwreck and reaches another community
claim_or_observation: Sadhuvan survives a storm and maritime disaster reaches an island or Naga-associated community and communicates across difference
notes: Cross-reference maritime dossier and geographic caution

title: Sadhuvan argues for protection of vulnerable survivors
claim_or_observation: Sadhuvan urges the island community to rescue shipwrecked people rather than kill exploit or seize from them
notes: His ethical change does not erase prior household harm

title: Aadhirai and Sadhuvan reunite after altered journeys
claim_or_observation: Sadhuvan later returns and the narrative presents reunion with Aadhirai after his survival and moral change
notes: Verify whether forgiveness reconciliation and household restoration are explicit or inferred

title: Aadhirai gives the first household offering
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai is directed to Aadhirai's household and Aadhirai gives the first offering associated with the Amudhasurabhi feeding mission
notes: Extends existing EV-0052 with character-specific context

title: Aadhirai's offering carries a universal hunger wish
claim_or_observation: The offering is connected with a wish that hunger or suffering from hunger disappear beyond the private household
notes: Verify exact Tamil blessing and scope

title: Fire sequence cannot be romanticised
claim_or_observation: Aadhirai's attempted death cannot be staged as ideal wifehood erotic sacrifice proof of chastity or a model for present conduct
notes: Binding direction edit music publicity and safety rule

title: Private grain becomes public life through women's trust
claim_or_observation: The first-offering scene can dramatise household food authority and trust between Aadhirai and Manimekalai as the bridge from sacred vessel to organised public feeding
notes: Requires Tamil household economy food-history and gender review
